Footer.legalNotice: PeptiBrain is a personal tracking diary. It is not medical advice and does not replace a healthcare professional, and it does not recommend doses: it records what you decide. Testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) is a prescription hormonal treatment that requires diagnosis and ongoing medical follow-up; never start or adjust it on your own. Always consult a professional before making decisions about your health.
Footer.tagline: Your peptide and wellness diary: doses, vials, and progress in one place.

viviana.quote: I went from a thousand scattered notes on my phone to having it all in PeptiBrain in under 10 seconds. A total shift for my productivity.

marco.quote: Stop eyeballing how much is left in each vial. With PeptiBrain you know the exact remainder instantly and avoid unpleasant surprises.

isa.quote: Keeping my streak has become my daily challenge. I’ve tried a thousand wellness apps, but PeptiBrain is the first one I haven’t dropped within a week.

Help.title: Help center
Help.subtitle: Search your question or browse the FAQ.
Help.noResults: We couldn't find anything. Write to us and we'll help.
Help.start1Q: How do I start using PeptiBrain?
Help.start1A: When you sign up, a one-minute onboarding creates your first peptide, its vial and your first dose. Then, from Home, you mark each dose as taken to keep your streak going.
Help.start2Q: How do I log a dose?
Help.start2A: In Peptides → Uses tab, tap 'Log use', pick the peptide, date/time and amount. You can also mark the next dose as taken directly from Home.
Help.vials1Q: How do I know how much is left in a vial?
Help.vials1A: Each vial stores its amount and bacteriostatic water, so you see the exact concentration (mg/mL). The Vials tab shows its status (reconstituted or not) and your progress.
Help.tools1Q: What are the calculator and converter?
Help.tools1A: In Peptides → Calculator (Premium) you get two tools: reconstitution tells you how much water to add and how many units to draw; the converter switches between mg, mcg and insulin units instantly.
Help.stats1Q: Where do I see my progress and how much I invest?
Help.stats1A: In the Statistics tab: charts of your doses over time, adherence, most-used peptide, weight change and money invested in peptides (if you add each vial's price). You can filter by day, week, month, year or a custom range.
Help.family1Q: How do I share with my family?
Help.family1A: With the Family plan you'll see the Family tab: invite by email there. The person gets the invite and accepts it from their own account (no one gets in without permission). Then they can see the data you share, each with their own privacy.
Help.plan1Q: What does each plan include and how much does it cost?
Help.plan1A: Free: 1 peptide, 1 vial, streak and calendar. Premium ($9/mo): unlimited peptides and vials, calculator and converter, AI Assistant, full health and protocols. Family ($19/mo): everything in Premium for up to 3 accounts. There's a 7-day free trial.
Help.plan2Q: How do I change or cancel my subscription?
Help.plan2A: Your plan is managed in Hotmart (who processes payment). From Account you can see your plan and find the link to cancel. If you cancel, you keep access until the end of the paid period.
Help.privacy1Q: Is my data safe? Can I export or delete it?
Help.privacy1A: Yes. Your data is only yours and travels encrypted. You can download a report from the profile menu, and delete your account and all your data whenever you want from Account (immediate and irreversible).
Help.privacy2A: No. PeptiBrain is a diary: it only logs what you decide. We don't suggest doses or give medical advice. Always consult a health professional.
Help.account1Q: I forgot my password, what do I do?
Help.account1A: On the login screen, use 'Forgot your password?'. You'll get an email with a link to create a new one. Check your spam folder too.
Help.install1Q: How do I install the app on my iPhone or Android?
Help.install1A: PeptiBrain works in any browser. To install it as an app: on iPhone (Safari) tap Share → 'Add to Home Screen'; on Android (Chrome) tap the ⋮ menu → 'Install app'.
Help.contact1Q: I can't find what I'm looking for, how do I contact you?
Help.contact1A: Email us at hello@peptibrain.com with your question and your account email. We'll reply as soon as possible.

Legal.termsIntro: These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your use of PeptiBrain ("the App", "the Service"), operated by Digital Dreams World LLC. By creating an account or using the App, you agree to these Terms.

termsSections.title: 1. What PeptiBrain is
termsSections.body: PeptiBrain is a personal tracking diary to help you log your doses, vials, weight, hydration, and other peptide-protocol-related data. PeptiBrain is NOT a medical device, does NOT provide diagnosis, treatment, or medical advice of any kind, and does NOT replace consultation with a qualified healthcare professional. The reconstitution profiles and calculations included are informational reference values, not personalized medical recommendations.

termsSections.title: 2. Who can use the Service
termsSections.body: You must be at least 18 years old to create an account. By registering, you confirm that the information you provide (name, email, phone) is accurate and that you meet this age requirement.

termsSections.title: 3. Your account
termsSections.body: You're responsible for keeping your password confidential and for all activity on your account. Let us know right away if you notice any unauthorized use.

termsSections.title: 4. Plans, pricing and subscription
termsSections.body: PeptiBrain offers a Free plan and paid plans (Premium and Family), billed monthly or annually through Hotmart, our payment processor. Paid plans may include a free trial period; if you don't cancel before it ends, you'll be automatically charged the price of your chosen plan. You can cancel anytime from your account or directly in Hotmart; cancellation takes effect at the end of the period already paid for, with no partial refunds unless required by applicable law.

termsSections.title: 5. Family sharing
termsSections.body: If you enable sharing, you decide — person by person — whether a family member or partner sees a "summary" or the "full detail" of your information. You can revoke that access at any time. Invited members cannot edit or delete your data.

termsSections.title: 6. Acceptable use
termsSections.body: You may not use PeptiBrain for illegal activities, to impersonate someone else, to attempt to breach the security of the Service, or to resell or redistribute access to your account.

termsSections.title: 7. Limitation of liability
termsSections.body: PeptiBrain is provided "as is". To the extent permitted by law, we're not liable for health decisions you make based on data you yourself logged in the App. Always consult a healthcare professional before starting, changing, or stopping any protocol.

termsSections.title: 8. Changes to these Terms
termsSections.body: We may update these Terms from time to time. If changes are material, we'll notify you by email or within the App.

termsSections.title: 9. Contact
termsSections.body: For any questions about these Terms, write to us at hello@peptibrain.com.

Legal.privacyIntro: This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect on PeptiBrain, what we use it for, and what rights you have over it.

privacySections.title: 1. What data we collect
privacySections.body: Account data: name, email address, WhatsApp number. App usage data: peptides, vials, doses, weight/hydration/exercise/side-effect logs, and your family group settings. Basic technical browsing data for analytics purposes (pages visited, usage events).

privacySections.title: 2. What we use your data for
privacySections.body: To provide the service (storing and showing you your history), to process your payment if you choose a Premium/Family plan, to communicate with you about your account, and to understand — in aggregate — how the App is used so we can improve it. We NEVER sell your health data to third parties for advertising purposes.

privacySections.title: 3. Who we share data with
privacySections.body: We use trusted providers to operate the Service: Supabase (database and authentication), Vercel (hosting), Hotmart (payment processing), and Mixpanel (product analytics). Each only receives the data strictly necessary for its function. We don't share your health data with advertisers.

privacySections.title: 4. Sharing with your family
privacySections.body: If you choose to invite a family member or partner, that person will only see the level of detail ("summary" or "full") you assign them. This decision is yours and you can change or revoke it at any time.

privacySections.title: 5. Security
privacySections.body: Your data travels encrypted (HTTPS) and is stored with row-level access controls (RLS), so only you — and whoever you explicitly authorize — can read your information.

privacySections.title: 6. Your rights
privacySections.body: You can access, correct, export, or delete your data at any time from the "Family" section of the App (export) or by writing to hello@peptibrain.com to request full account deletion.

privacySections.title: 7. Children
privacySections.body: PeptiBrain is not directed at anyone under 18 and we don't knowingly collect data from minors.

privacySections.title: 8. Changes to this Policy
privacySections.body: If we make significant changes, we'll notify you by email or within the App before they take effect.

privacySections.title: 9. Contact
privacySections.body: For any request related to your data, write to us at hello@peptibrain.com.

AvisoLegal.title: Legal Notice
AvisoLegal.intro: In compliance with disclosure requirements, the identifying details of the company responsible for PeptiBrain are provided below.

sections.title: Registered address
sections.body: 2105 Vista Oeste NW Suite E 3564, Albuquerque, NM 87120, United States

sections.title: Purpose
sections.body: PeptiBrain is a web application (peptibrain.com) offering a personal tracking diary for peptide protocols. It is not a medical service and does not replace consultation with a healthcare professional.

sections.title: Governing law
sections.body: Use of this site and the Terms of Service are governed by the laws of the State of New Mexico, United States, without prejudice to any consumer protection rights recognized under the laws of your country of residence.

Cookies.title: Cookie Policy
Cookies.intro: This policy explains what cookies and similar technologies PeptiBrain uses, what they're for, and how you can control them.

sections.title: 1. What a cookie is
sections.body: A small file saved in your browser to remember information between visits, like your preferred language or your logged-in session.

sections.title: 2. Cookies we use
sections.body: Necessary: to keep you signed in (Supabase) and remember your language (NEXT_LOCALE) — without these, the App won't work. Analytics: Mixpanel, to understand — in aggregate — how the App is used (which screens are visited, which buttons are used) so we can improve it. We don't use advertising or cross-site tracking cookies.

sections.title: 3. How to control them
sections.body: You can delete or block cookies from your browser settings at any time. Note that blocking necessary cookies may prevent you from signing in or using the App normally.

sections.title: 4. Changes to this Policy
sections.body: If we change what cookies we use, we'll update this page and, if the change is significant, notify you within the App.

sections.title: 5. Contact
sections.body: For any questions about this policy, write to us at hello@peptibrain.com.

Reembolsos.title: Refund Policy
Reembolsos.intro: This policy explains how billing and refunds work for PeptiBrain's paid plans, processed through Hotmart.

sections.title: 1. Free trial period
sections.body: Premium and Family plans include a 7-day free trial. No charge is made during this time. If you cancel before the trial ends, you won't be charged anything.

sections.title: 2. Automatic billing
sections.body: If you don't cancel before the trial ends, you'll be automatically charged the price of your chosen plan (monthly or annual), and the subscription will renew each cycle until you cancel.

sections.title: 3. How to cancel
sections.body: You can cancel anytime from the "My Account" section within the App, or directly from the purchase confirmation email Hotmart sends you. Canceling prevents future charges, but doesn't automatically refund the period already paid for.

sections.title: 4. Refund requests
sections.body: If you believe you were charged by mistake, or want to request a refund, write to us at hello@peptibrain.com or contact Hotmart support directly (who processes the payment) — we evaluate each case individually, always respecting the rights recognized under your country's consumer protection laws.

CookieBanner.message: We use necessary cookies for the app to work, and analytics cookies (Mixpanel) to understand how to improve it. We don't use advertising cookies.
CookieBanner.necessaryDesc: Always on — make the app work (session, language).
CookieBanner.analyticsDesc: Helps us understand how to improve the app.

Tools.disclaimer: This tool is for informational and educational purposes only. It is not medical advice and does not replace a healthcare professional. Peptides and GLP-1 medications should be used under medical supervision. Testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) is a prescription hormonal treatment: it should only be started after lab-confirmed deficiency and with ongoing medical follow-up, never on your own. Always consult your doctor before starting or adjusting any protocol.
Tools.ctaTitle: Keep your whole protocol in one place
Tools.ctaBody: PeptiBrain stores your vials, calculates your doses, reminds you of every shot, and tracks your progress. Start free.

Calculadora.metaDescription: Free calculator for how many units to draw based on your vial and bacteriostatic water. Fast, clear peptide reconstitution with a visual syringe.
Calculadora.subtitle: Enter your vial's mg, the bacteriostatic water you added, and your target dose. We tell you exactly how many units to draw, with a syringe diagram so you never miss.
Calculadora.overCapacity: The dose exceeds the syringe capacity. Use a larger syringe or more water.
Calculadora.emptyResult: Fill in the 3 fields and you'll see the units to draw here.
howSteps: Enter the mg (or mcg) your peptide vial contains.
Enter how many milliliters of bacteriostatic water you added.
Pick your syringe (U100 is the most common) and the dose you want to inject.
We show the exact units to draw and a syringe diagram.

faq.q: What does reconstituting a peptide mean?
faq.a: It means mixing the powdered (lyophilized) peptide in the vial with bacteriostatic water so it can be injected. The amount of water you add defines the concentration and therefore how many units you draw per dose.

faq.q: How much bacteriostatic water should I add?
faq.a: There's no single amount: more water means more diluted and more units for the same dose. What matters is always using the same amount for that vial and calculating from it. This calculator adapts to whatever amount you enter.

faq.q: What do the syringe units mean?
faq.a: On a U100 insulin syringe, 100 units equal 1 mL. The calculator converts your dose (in mg or mcg) into the units to draw based on your vial's concentration.
Yes, completely free and no signup. If you also want to store your vials, get dose reminders, and keep your history, you can use the PeptiBrain app.

Semaglutida.metaTitle: Free Semaglutide & Tirzepatide Dose Calculator | PeptiBrain
Semaglutida.metaDescription: Free calculator for semaglutide or tirzepatide units based on your vial and bacteriostatic water, with the full titration schedule (0.25 to 2.4 mg). Visual syringe.
Semaglutida.subtitle: Pick the compound, enter your vial's mg and the water you added, and we calculate the units to draw for each phase of the weekly titration.
Semaglutida.phaseDraw: Weeks {weeks} · {mg} mg — draw on the U100 syringe
Semaglutida.overCapacity: Exceeds one U100 syringe (100 U). Needs more than one draw or more water.
howSteps: Semaglutide and tirzepatide are increased gradually (titration) to reduce side effects.
Enter your vial's mg and the bacteriostatic water you added: that sets the concentration.
The table shows, for each weekly phase, how many units to draw on the U100 syringe.
Tap a row to see that phase drawn on the syringe.

faq.a: The reference schedule starts at 0.25 mg weekly for 4 weeks, then 0.5 mg, 1.0 mg, 1.7 mg, and up to 2.4 mg maintenance, changing every 4 weeks. Your doctor may adjust it to your case.
The reference schedule starts at 2.5 mg weekly and increases every 4 weeks: 5, 7.5, 10, 12.5, and up to 15 mg maintenance. Always as medically directed.

faq.q: Why does it give units, not mg?
faq.a: Because in the syringe you draw volume, not weight. The calculator converts each phase's mg into the exact U100 syringe units based on your vial's concentration.
No. It's an informational calculation tool. Semaglutide and tirzepatide are prescription medicines: their use and dosing must be directed and supervised by a healthcare professional.

Protocolos.metaTitle: Peptide library: doses, half-life & reconstitution | PeptiBrain
Protocolos.metaDescription: Search and filter the most used peptides: common dose, frequency, vial, bacteriostatic water and half-life. Calculate your units in one click.
Protocolos.subtitle: Search by name or filter by category: common dose, frequency, vial size, bacteriostatic water and half-life. Tap 'Calculate dose' and we send it straight to the calculator.
Protocolos.noResults: We couldn't find a peptide matching that name or filter.

faq.q: Where do these protocols come from?
faq.a: They are reference values compiled from public information circulating in the peptide community. They serve as a starting point for calculation; they are not a personalized medical prescription.
Yes. Each protocol opens the calculator with those values prefilled, but you can adjust them to what your doctor has indicated.

faq.q: Is it safe to follow these protocols?
faq.a: Peptides should be used under medical supervision. This guide is informational and educational; it does not recommend doses or replace a healthcare professional's assessment.

faq.q: Why don't some peptides show a half-life value?
faq.a: Because there's no reliable published pharmacokinetic study for that peptide in humans. We'd rather say "no reliable data" than show a made-up number.

Ideas.metaTitle: PeptiBrain Ideas & Roadmap — suggest and vote on improvements
Ideas.metaDescription: Suggest improvements for PeptiBrain and vote on the community's ideas. See what we're building on the roadmap. You help decide where the app goes.
Ideas.subtitle: Suggest improvements, upvote the ones you like, and see what we're building. You help decide where PeptiBrain goes next.
Ideas.fieldTitlePlaceholder: Your idea in one line (e.g. "Export my doses to Excel")
Ideas.fieldDescriptionPlaceholder: Tell us more (optional): what problem would it solve?
Ideas.empty: No ideas yet. Be the first to suggest one!

Comparador.metaTitle: Peptide comparator: dose, route & frequency side by side | PeptiBrain
Comparador.metaDescription: Compare two peptides side by side: administration route, common dose, frequency, vial and bacteriostatic water. Free, no signup.
Comparador.subtitle: Choose two peptides to see their route, dose, frequency and more, side by side.
Comparador.emptyState: Choose both peptides above to see the comparison.

faq.q: How is each peptide's data chosen?
faq.a: These are the same reference values we use in our protocols guide: common dose, frequency, vial and bacteriostatic water, compiled from public information circulating in the community.

faq.q: Can I use this to decide which peptide to use?
faq.a: This comparison is informational and educational. The decision of which peptide to use, at what dose, and under what circumstances is always a healthcare professional's call.

Eliminacion.metaTitle: Peptide clearance calculator: how long until it's out of your system | PeptiBrain
Eliminacion.metaDescription: Estimate how long a peptide takes to clear your system based on its half-life (5 half-lives = nearly fully cleared). Free, no signup.
Eliminacion.subtitle: Pick a peptide and we'll show you how long it takes to clear your system, based on its known half-life.
Eliminacion.methodNote: Estimated as 5 half-lives (~97% cleared). Varies by metabolism, accumulated dose and other individual factors — not an exact figure for you specifically.

faq.a: It's the standard pharmacology rule of thumb: after 5 half-lives, a compound is considered practically cleared from the body (~97%). It's the same reference clinical calculators use, not a made-up figure.

faq.q: Why don't all the Library's peptides show up here?
faq.a: We only include ones with reliable half-life data. When that data doesn't exist (or is too scattered), we'd rather leave the peptide out than give you a made-up estimate.

CostoPorMg.metaTitle: Peptide cost per mg calculator | PeptiBrain
CostoPorMg.metaDescription: Calculate how much each mg of a peptide costs you based on what you paid for the vial, and the cost of each dose. Free, no signup.
CostoPorMg.subtitle: Enter what you paid and the vial's content, and we'll tell you the cost per mg (and per dose).

faq.q: What currency is the calculation in?
faq.a: Whatever you enter — the calculator just divides the price by the vial's content, without converting currencies.

faq.q: Why don't all peptides show up in the selector?
faq.a: We only include ones dosed in mg. Ones dosed in IU (like growth hormone) don't share the same cost unit, so they don't apply here.
